title: Gemma Playground: Parallel Agents in Action
summary: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates Gemma 4's multi-agent capabilities by orchestrating 10 independent subagents on a single local machine to generate SVG art galleries in parallel. The setup achieves inference speeds above 170 tokens per second for concurrent task delegation and autonomous execution.
writeup: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates Gemma 4's multi-agent capabilities by orchestrating 10 independent subagents on a single local machine, delegating tasks in parallel to generate SVG art galleries. The setup sustains inference speeds above 170 tokens per second during concurrent delegation and autonomous execution. The demonstration shows that parallel agent orchestration runs locally rather than requiring remote infrastructure, with the subagents executing their assigned tasks independently.
